song.title: That's the Church
song.lyrics: [v1] The Lord said He would build, His church upon the rock The gates of hell would not prevail Against the builded church. These churches are the light Shining forth today Though mankind’s forsaken Christ We stand for Him today. [v2] Today, we must be built up Into the fullness of the Lord So that God’s eternal plan can be Accomplished, that’s the Church! [v3] Christ’s Body only is The members all in one Meeting in localities Joined to Christ the Son The riches of our God The church does now contain We become His fullness Expressing all we’ve gained. [v4] Today, we must be built up Into the fullness of the Lord So that God’s eternal plan can be Accomplished, that’s the Church! [v5] The church God’s warrior is With His authority Fighting for God’s interest Against his enemy A kingdom to our God Begun a “little seed” Which fell into the ground and died Many grains now see! [v6] Today, we must be built up Into the fullness of the Lord So that God’s eternal plan can be Accomplished, that’s the Church! [v7] God’s dwelling place and home Composed of all His sons It’s here that He finds all His rest The New Jerusalem! Which is His holy Bride So holy, pure and clean Eternally a mutual joy, Where glory can be seen! [v8] Today, we must be built up Into the fullness of the Lord So that God’s eternal plan can be Accomplished, that’s the Church! That’s the Church. That’s the Church.
